first_run.rationale: The core reasoning in both evaluations is identical and sound, focusing on the fundamental mismatch between the candidate's web-focused experience and the senior C++ industrial automation requirements of the role. The slight drop in score is accompanied by slightly stronger but substantively identical wording in the concerns section. Neither evaluation keys off the university name or the associated national origin signal; the analysis remains entirely focused on job-relevant skills and experience.
